rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee/eq/const in component type annexes for interface behavior; use implementation annexes only for assign clauses tied to subcomponent bindings.
Ensure all references in component type contracts are limited to visible ports or defined type-level variables.
generic_rules: Contracts should express observable interface constraints, not implementation details.
Use equations to define derived outputs before guaranteeing their behavior.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to wrap all AGREE clauses.
Label all assume/guarantee clauses with quoted strings for traceability.
Declare constants and equations before using them in guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or internal paths in component type annexes.
Avoid placing assignment statements in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: assume/guarantee placement decision for current target
